products.name: TWS Royal Wireless Earbuds | 40H Playtime, Heavy Bass & Dual Pairing
products.short_description: Elevate your audio with 40 hours of non-stop heavy bass and seamless dual pairing.
products.description:
Experience the ultimate fusion of style and sound with the TWS Royal Wireless Earbuds. Engineered for the modern Indian lifestyle, these earbuds deliver a punchy, heavy bass signature that brings your favorite Bollywood hits and EDM tracks to life. Whether you are commuting in a crowded metro or sweating it out at the gym, the ergonomic, sweat-proof design ensures a secure and comfortable fit all day long.

Stay connected without the constant hunt for a charger. With an industry-leading 40 hours of total playtime and lightning-fast charging, a quick 10-minute juice-up gives you enough power for your morning workout. The advanced dual-pairing technology allows you to seamlessly switch between your laptop for work calls and your smartphone for music, making it the perfect companion for multitasking professionals. High-quality micro-drivers and a sleek finish make the TWS Royal a premium choice for every audiophile on a budget.
features: Extended 40-Hour Playtime: Enjoy uninterrupted music and calls for days on a single charge, perfect for long travels.
Lightning Fast Charging: Get back to your rhythm quickly with rapid charging support that fuels your day in minutes.
Seamless Dual Pairing: Connect to your phone and laptop simultaneously and switch between them effortlessly.
Thunderous Heavy Bass: Custom-tuned drivers designed to deliver deep, rich bass for a concert-like experience.
IPX4 Sweat Resistance: Built to withstand intense workouts and light rain, making them your ideal fitness partner.
Universal Compatibility: Pairs instantly with all Bluetooth-enabled Android, iOS, and Windows devices.
Crystal Clear Calls: Integrated high-definition microphone ensures your voice is heard loud and clear during office meetings.
